fileContext.overview: Defines a rate limiter utility for the LLM module.

symbols.name: RateLimiter
symbols.purpose: Represents a rate limiter that tracks timestamps of recent requests.
symbols.behavior: Has two properties: windowMs and timestamps.
symbols.limitations: Must have windowMs and timestamps properties.

symbols.name: acquire
symbols.behavior: Blocks until a slot is available.
symbols.limitations: Must block until a slot is available.

symbols.name: usedInWindow
symbols.purpose: Gets the number of requests used in the current window.
symbols.behavior: Returns the number of requests used in the current window.
symbols.limitations: Must return the number of requests used in the current window.
